name: Pepper Coated Stuffed Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 tablespoons of instant minced onion with 2 tablespoons of water and set aside for 10 minutes to soften.
2. In a large skillet, heat 4 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the softened onion mixture to the hot oil and sauté until golden, about 1 minute.
4. Add chopped mushrooms and 3/4 teaspoon of salt to the pan. Sauté until all the liquid has evaporated, about 8 minutes.
5. Stir in 1 cup of dry bread crumbs and 1 beaten egg. Mix well and allow to cool.
6. Stuff the mushroom mixture into the pockets created in the flank steak.
7. Sprinkle both sides of the steak with coarse ground black pepper and 1/2 teaspoon of salt.
8. Cook over coals for 4 minutes on each side until medium rare.
